text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I-I absolutely have to do a good job at the enka
contest...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It all started when Sakura Chiyono O and I were
on our way back to the academy after spending
the day out and about...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O! Can you please participate in an
Umamusume enka contest we're holding?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's an event for the elderly... One of the
participants got injured and can't make it
anymore, so...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Chiyono, you're always humming enka
songs with gliding note changes and stuff, so you
must be good! Please, you've gotta do this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
O-oh gosh! I'm flattered, but I couldn't possibly! I
only dabble a little in enka, so I'm nowhere near
good enough. Although...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I suppose the saying does go that "every race
starts with the first furlong." In other words, that
first step is the most important... Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so Sakura Chiyono O signs up as a
participant in the enka contest.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! ♪
My looove is swallowed by the wiiind ♪
And vanishes in the dark waaaves! ♪

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text:
Th-that was wonderful, Kita! My heart is still
racing from your performance!

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
Your vocal runs and vibrato were wonderful... Oh,
I've grown soft with age... I'm starting to tear up...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(Urgh... I'm so scared about going on stage...
B-but I have to muster up the courage for the
sake of performing with Opera O!)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! ♪
The snooow wraps youuu ♪
In its embraaace! ♪

text_block_list.name: Man B
text_block_list.text:
Very good, Doto! That delicate voice of yours is
incredible!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Everyone's amazing... Their singing is so
captivating... But...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm next... Wh-what am I going to do? My hands
are shaking!

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
And now for someone who impresses even Kitasan
Black! It's Sakura Chiyono O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(I-I have to sing my best... Uh... Uh... How do
enka songs go again?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O is shaking, but I can tell there's
nothing to worry about. I know just how
courageous she really is.
choice_data_list:
Remember, every race starts with the first
furlong!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Right... I don't have time to flounder around like
this... I just need to open my mouth... and sing the
first verse!)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: A-as the clouds scatter...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yaaah! ♪
Your love is reveaaaled ♪
In the shadow of the mooon! ♪

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text: Wow! What feeling!

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! Such emotion! I can tell just from her
singing just how genuine her feelings are!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! ♪
Dearest cherry blossoms of the niiight! ♪
Tell me nooow, do you feel my looove? ♪

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pheeew... I actually managed to do it...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O! That was so moving! All of your feelings came across like bam! Hit me right in the heart!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-that really warmed my heart too! Your singing
is so comforting.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What? Me? But I'm nowhere near as good as
either of you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh! Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you, everyone! My face is getting red...
Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But you know, Trainer... You're the reason I was
able to sing so well.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I was panicking and didn't know what to do... But
when I heard your voice, I realized...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Even if I'm by myself onstage, I'm not alone.
There are people out there watching me and
supporting me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's why I decided to pour all my feelings of
appreciation into my song!
choice_data_list: Those feelings came across loud and clear.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Great! Hehe... It'd be nice to participate in
another Umamusume enka contest sometime.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Oh! We can ask for an encore? Encore! Encore!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's going on?
choice_data_list:
They loved your singing so much, they want to
hear it again!

They loved your singing so much, they want to
hear it again!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-o-oh dear... Are they sure? I mean... what if I
mess up?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You'll be fine! Just remember, every race starts
with the first furlong! Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Great! We'll start with the first furlong, then! Let's
combine our strength and give 'em a great
encore! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O & Doto
text_block_list.text:
Woo! ♪
W-woo! ♪
